step.title: Insertion
step.text: Cadet, this is your first Shadow Recruit field operation. Move quietly, keep your suit low, and read the room before you cross open ground. Good luck, cadet.

notes: Gameplay camera keeps the player close enough to read the hero, nearby floor texture, cover, doors, and objectives.
